ch1_ai.title: Using AI
ch1_ai.intro: Iranians are dodging American AI sanctions — and cataloguing both how to use the tools and how to see through them. On January 1, the channel's first post of the year was a Christmas portrait generator for Gemini, with detailed prompt parameters and a warning to install a VPN first. Days later it ran a Porsche ad praised for being "made by humans, not AI," a geolocation investigation debunking protest footage as fake, and a tutorial on spotting AI-generated images.

posts.keywords: Ai-generated photo, Bypassing sanctions for technology

posts.text_en:
🛑 Porsche chose humans over artificial intelligence

💻 Porsche's new advertisement was made by humans and is not the work of artificial intelligence.

🆔 @akhbarenfejari
posts.text_fa:
🛑 پورشه، انسان رو به‌جای هوش مصنوعی انتخاب کرد

💻 تبلیغ جدید شرکت پورش، توسط انسان ساخته شده و کار هوش‌ مصنوعی نیست.

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

posts.keywords: Protests, AI-generated videos debunked, geolocation, Pro-regime
posts.audio_en: Beware of media traps. Many of the published scenes are directed by the enemy.

posts.text_en:
How can we distinguish images created with artificial intelligence from real ones?🧐

🆔 @akhbarenfejari
posts.text_fa:
چجوری تصاویر ساخته شده با هوش مصنوعی رو از واقعی تشخیص بدیم؟🧐

🆔 @akhbarenfejari
posts.keywords: Detecting AI-generated images, reverse image search
posts.audio_en:
These days we've been witnessing the spread of videos and images — we were in some virtual spaces dealing with protests where the content being played was fake. Original tweets were saying certain things were fake, and they became clearly self-documented by the day. You can find specific things — for example, there's a lot going on inside it, but it hasn't been well-ridden [i.e., well-examined], it's there with its own finger [i.e., fingerprints/traces]. Zoom in, zoom in on these fingerprints. Usually where the edges are, look carefully, do it in writing. Look — whether it's outside or without a body or lifeless — or [zoom in] a hundred times, again and again.
Use a reverse image search. When you upload something to one place, it gives you a source from another place. We can — if the video and the news [are checked] — [run it through] tools like Google Lens or Metadata or in the comments on social media, platforms like X [Twitter] that are doing this work. Look at the dark shadow — what direction it gives — if the work has been done, if it's been coded, say that it's there, it's trapped [i.e., it's been manipulated].
Also in the credits and timestamps, again the same trap. That — yes — it's possible, I respectfully ask, look carefully at this side, at this edge, at what's being given — the century/era that has passed. Sometimes from your own era they load it back again if there's something to be seen. They go from the original source, they do the work from the original source — again the same placement. Every other [tool] in Persian does fifteen [checks] — sometimes it does, sometimes the text [reveals it]

posts.text_en:
💩 It's interesting to know that Trump's latest reaction to protesters in America was that with an artificial intelligence video he poured sewage on their heads

Now he's come and his heart aches for the Iranian people😂

ch2_regime.title: From Anti-Regime to Pro-Regime
ch2_regime.intro: In January the channel platformed anti-regime voices: Amin Salimi telling people to protest "within a framework," mockery of Mohammad Reza Farzin's appointment as economic advisor, Foad Izadi warning not to trust Axios. Then at 01:22 AM on February 28, the first US–Israeli strike hit Tehran. The feed became a live battle tracker. By mid-March it was producing Lego-animated music videos in praise of the IRGC and Ayatollah Khamenei.

posts_before.text_en: 🛑 Gentlemen, give value to protests within a framework!! Amin Salimi, presenter of the Zamana program, speaking about people's protests regarding economic issues. Let's not let our protests be confiscated.
posts_before.text_fa:
🛑 آقایون، به اعتراض تو چهارچوب بها بدید!!

🔺️صحبت های امین سلیمی، مجری برنامه زمانه در مورد اعتراضات مردم به مسائل اقتصادی 

🔺️نذاریم اعتراضمون رو مصادره کنن

🆔 @akhbarenfejari
posts_before.audio_en:
Gentlemen, protest within a framework has value. Wherever I was, I tried to make the voice of those without a voice reach [those in power]. There are two things in this — I'll follow up on what weighs on my shoulders — the voice of protest must be heard. First: the official who listens. The official who does this work. The official who pays attention. Someone who wants the voice of protest to be heard, who doesn't let their decisions make the parties grow [in opposition]. Second: the person who hijacks the first step of your protest for their own political goals — they lose the main message, they don't let the real voice reach [anyone], they don't let the voice and the cry arrive.
This protest, on both sides, becomes wholly a mission of political deficit. Both are bad — ultimately they silence the voice of the people's protest. They don't allow the words to be transmitted properly, gentlemen.
See protest within a framework as valuable. [But also] don't see protest only within a framework. People come and speak about our protest, but our voice is not heard. Those who operate within the framework of balance — you show the people that there is a tool, a resource, a balance that exists.

posts_before.text_en:
🛑 Did you mock the people?!!!!!

Farzin became the special economic advisor to the president!!!😳

🔹 The president, in a decree, appointed Mohammad Reza Farzin as his special economic advisor, given his commitment, executive record and valuable experience!!!

⚠️ If Mr. Farzin was competent, why did you keep him at the Central Bank?!
Some people's management doesn't end, but rather transfers from one chair to another😤

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

posts_before.text_en:
🛑 Let's not be bitten twice from the same hole

🔺️Foad Izadi, a Tehran University professor, said the goal of Axios's news-making from Trump and Netanyahu's disagreement is to deceive Iran.

🔺️They want us to think that Trump won't allow Netanyahu to attack Iran because of their differences.

🔺️The reality is that they are planning an attack and we should not repeat our previous mistakes in our analyses.

🆔 @akhbarenfejari
posts_before.text_fa:
🛑 از یه سوراخ دوبار گزیده نشیم

🔺️فواد ایزدی، استاد دانشگاه تهران گفت هدف خبرسازی اکسیوس از اختلاف نظر ترامپ و نتانیاهو فریب ایرانه.

🔺️می‌خوان ما فکر کنیم ترامپ به خاطر اختلافاتش با نتانیاهو اجازه‌ی حمله به ایران رو بهش نمیده.

🔺️واقعیت اینه که اونا دارن برنامه‌ی حمله رو میچینن و نباید تو تحلیل‌ها اشتباه قبلی رو تکرار کنیم.

🆔 @akhbarenfejari
posts_before.audio_en:
The point that was supposed to be observed/maintained — unfortunately it became distorted, because you — yes — could not digest/absorb it, because [someone] was doing [something] — the tension — they wouldn't let [it through], their differences were greater. What happened — [someone] was doing [it] — on Saturday too they were showing leniency toward everything. This was a kind of killing that, in our view, has not been heard/acknowledged — with every wind it wouldn't be raised [i.e., it kept being buried]. This is what it is — that we write a letter. This matter needed to be published in the press, in the media window — to the tension that existed — [they] could not digest/absorb it.
We are exposed/vulnerable — your government has no stability—

posts_after.audio_en: We're discussing what we know, we're discussing what we should do. We know that. As the news says, the war will continue for a few more days. At the end of the reports from America. When the day gets hot, it becomes a real conflict of interests. Every day gets worse. The situation is like this with Israel, Israel's involvement, America, and China. With resistance in the region, there are very high costs for many people suffering and dying in the war. Most importantly, we should understand what kind of war this is, what kind of war. We want to reach a goal where we ourselves can determine our future path. Or should we distance ourselves from a demanding situation and take shelter? According to one analysis, this war is America's conflict and its legitimacy. Everyone wants the benefits of America and the benefits of resistance. So everyone has one goal, everyone has one path. It looks like no one has a clear plan. According to a report we have access to, there's talk of American military bases, military infrastructure, financial centers that need to be targeted. This war has America's impact in the region from every angle - its legitimacy. There's a legitimacy question. From America's interests in different regions to America's interests and its position in the world. The American position is such that America is engaged in various operations. If war were to happen, there wouldn't be a specific plan. These are the issues we're discussing. The possibility of closing the Strait, without a plan, is still there. But we should understand that we need to be prepared. We need to understand this situation as part of our policy. The question of defending against strikes, the question of how to handle the Strait of Hormuz without a plan, and everything else, what do we do? This is an ethical issue for the media. We also see the reports...

ch3_popculture.title: Pop Culture
ch3_popculture.intro: Between the geopolitics, the team betrays how young it is. Exam-night memes. The friend who texts you the key points half an hour before the test. Parents' terms of endearment lifted from Iranian films.

posts.text_en: Our shared pain 😭🫂 🕯️ Of course, some don't even study the night of the exam because they have a friend who tells them all the key points half an hour before the exam 😂 🆔 @akhbarenfejari

ch4_intervention.title: Foreign Intervention
ch4_intervention.intro: Stories about foreign meddling loop back to Iran's own anxieties. The channel followed the Jalisco cartel taking Guadalajara — a 2026 World Cup host city — in granular detail, and revisited its geolocation of protest footage the regime calls foreign-staged.

posts.text_en:
🛑 World Cup host city fell!

🔺 The city of Guadalajara, host of the 2026 World Cup, fell to the hands of criminals less than four months before the start of these games.

🔺 After operations by Mexican police and the killing of Mencho, the leader of new generation drug cartels, these criminal groups took control of the city.

🔺 The CJNG cartel with approximately 19,000 members and extensive operations in 21 of Mexico's 32 states is the most powerful cartel in Mexico.
posts.text_fa:
🛑 شهر میزبان جام جهانی سقوط کرد!

🔺️شهر گوادالاخارا، میزبان جام جهانی ٢٠٢۶، کمتر از چهار ماه مونده به شروع این بازی‌ها، به‌دست افراد تبهکار سقوط کرد. 

🔺️بعد از عملیات پلیس مکزیک و کشتن منچو، رهبر کارتل‌‌های نسل جدید موادمخدر، این گروه‌های خلافکار کنترل شهر رو به دست گرفتن.

🔺️کارتل CJNG با حدود ۱۹۰۰۰ عضو و عملیات گسترده در ۲۱ ایالت از ۳۲ ایالت مکزیک، قدرتمندترین کارتل تو مکزیکه.

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

posts.text_en:
🎥 Video of continuation of clashes between members of Jalisco cartel with Mexican army in Guadalajara

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

ch5_economy.title: Iranian Economy
ch5_economy.intro: Sanctions, appointments, and the cost of bypassing both. The channel mocks the Farzin appointment, charts which countries America sanctions most, and quietly teaches workarounds for sanctioned technology.

posts.text_en:
🛑 Did you mock the people?!!!!!

Farzin became the special economic advisor to the president!!!😳

🔹 The president, in a decree, appointed Mohammad Reza Farzin as his special economic advisor, given his commitment, executive record and valuable experience!!!

⚠️ If Mr. Farzin was competent, why did you keep him at the Central Bank?!
Some people's management doesn't end, but rather transfers from one chair to another😤

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

⚠️اگه آقای فرزین کارآمد بود خب همون بانک مرکزی نگهش می‌داشتین!!!
مدیریت بعضی افراد تموم نمیشه، بلکه از صندلی به صندلی دیگه منتقل میشه😤

posts.keywords: Iranian economy, Anti-regime, Mohammad Reza Farzin

Which countries experienced the most sanctions?🤔

😡 America doesn't impose these sanctions because of human rights protection or ethical principles, only to protect its own interests!!!

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

کدوم کشورها بیشترین تحریم‌ها رو تجربه کردن؟🤔

🔻 یکی از ابزارهای آمریکا برای متوقف کردن هر کشوری که با منافعش همسو نیست، تحریم‌ هست!

😡 آمریکا این تحریم‌ها رو به‌خاطر حفاظت از حقوق‌بشر یا اصول اخلاقی نمی‌گذاره، فقط به‌خاطر حفاظت از منافع خودش اعمال می‌کنه!!!

posts.keywords: Ai-generated photo, Bypassing sanctions for technology

ch6_international.title: International News
ch6_international.intro: Gaza. Axios. Jeffrey Sachs saying Washington "never intended to negotiate." The Gaza football team thanking Pep Guardiola. JD Vance booed at the Milan Olympics. The channel curates a very specific map of the world — one where American media always has an angle.

posts.text_en: 🛑 Don't talk to us about disarming. Osama Hamdan, a senior member of Hamas movement, said Israel wants to forcibly displace Palestinians from Gaza and the West Bank. 🔺️ When the Zionists are not committed to any of their commitments, any talk of Hamas disarmament is futile and fictional. 🆔 @akhbarenfejari
posts.text_fa:
🛑 با ما از تحویل سلاح حرف نزنین

🔺️اسامه حمدان، عضو ارشد جنبش حماس گفت اسرائیل می‌خواد به زور فلسطینی‌ها رو از غزه و کرانه باختری کوچ بده.

🔺️وقتی صهیونیست‌ها به هیچ‌یک از تعهداتشون پایبند نیستن، هر صحبتی از تحویل سلاح حماس، بیهوده و تخیلیه.

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

posts.text_en:
🛑 Shut Your Big Mouth Israeli!!

🔺️ These war-loving channels on Ita and Telegram had spread fake news quoting Axios news agency saying Trump gave Iran 24 hours to come negotiate or else he would attack.

Ben Sabti, a famous Zionist on Twitter, eagerly did this news with a screenshot from one of these channels 🙄🤦

🔺️ Now Barack Ravid, editor-in-chief of Axios, came under Ben Sabti's tweet and said we never published such news :)))

🆔 @akhbarenfejari
posts.text_fa:
🛑 کم خالی ببند اسرائیلی !!

🔺یه خبر فیکی رو این کانالهای عشق جنگ ایتا و تلگرام پخش کرده بودن به نقل از خبرگزاری آکسیوس که می‌گفت ترامپ ۲۴ ساعت به ایران فرصت داده که بیاد مذاکره وگرنه حمله می‌کنه

بن سبطی، صهیونیست معروف توییترم با ذوق اومد این خبرو با اسکرین شات یکی از همین کانالا کار کرد🙄🤦

🔺حالا الان باراک راوید، سردبیر آکسیوس اومده زیر توییت بن سبطی گفته ما اصلا چنین خبری رو کار نکردیم :)))

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

posts.text_en:
🛑 America has no real intention to negotiate

🔺️Jeffrey Sachs, a famous professor at Columbia University, said that America's goal was never to negotiate. Every time negotiation was mentioned, Israel objected loudly and since America is under Israel's control, in fact America never seriously pursued negotiation.

🔺️Trump proved this fact last summer; we haven't forgotten that Israel, with the support of the United States, bombed Iran. This attack was only two days before planned negotiations between the United States and Iran.

🆔 @akhbarenfejari
posts.text_fa:
🛑 آمریکا قصد واقعی برای مذاکره نداره

🔺️جفری ساکس، استاد مشهور دانشگاه کلمبیا گفت هدف آمریکا هیچ‌وقت مذاکره نبوده. هر زمان که صحبت از مذاکره شده، اسرائیل با سر و صدای زیاد مخالفت کرده و از اون‌جایی که افسار آمریکا دست اسرائیله، در واقع آمریکا هم هیچ‌وقت جدی مذاکره رو دنبال نکرده.

🔺️ترامپ این واقعیت رو تابستان گذشته ثابت کرد؛ یادمون نرفته که اسرائیل با حمایت ایالات متحده ایران رو بمبارون کرد. این حمله تنها دو روز قبل از مذاکرات برنامه‌ریزی‌شده بین آمریکا و ایران بود.

🆔 @akhbarenfejari
posts.audio_en: An attack is imminent I think. The goal here has never been negotiation. Whenever there has been negotiation, Israel has jumped up and down saying don't negotiate. Of course a nuclear agreement was reached with Iran a decade ago. The joint comprehensive plan of action, JCPOA. It was actually ratified by the UN on the 20th of July 2015, then Trump ripped it up in his first term. So there's never been any desire by Israel to have a negotiated settlement. And since the United States does what Israel tells it to do, there has never been a readiness of the United States to have real negotiations.

posts.text_en: No dignity anywhere. JD Vance, Trump's vice president, appeared at the opening ceremony of the Winter Olympics in Milan. A reporter asked Trump if he saw that JD Vance appeared at the Olympic opening ceremony? Trump said this is surprising because people love him. He won't appear in this country!
posts.text_fa:
🛑هیچ‌جا آبرو ندارن

🔺️ جی دی ونس، معاون ترامپ، تو مراسم افتتاحیه المپیک زمستانی در میلان هو شد.

🔺️خبرنگار از ترامپ پرسید آیا دیدید که جی دی ونس تو مراسم افتتاحیه المپیک هو شد؟

🔺️ترامپ گفت این تعجب آوره، چون مردم اونو دوست دارن. او تو این کشور هو نمیشه!

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

ch7_weather.title: Weather and Landscape
ch7_weather.intro: An obsession with snow. Flamingos at Miankaleh wetland with Damavand in the distance. 1.5 meters of snowfall on the Mahabad-to-Boukan road. Snowfall in Ahar. In Marivan. In the border villages of Urmia. Posted with background music and no politics.
